message:
perf: add #[inline] to hot-path cancel check and Cx clone

Add #[inline] hints to the most frequently called functions:
- SymbolCancelToken::is_cancelled() (called on every task poll)
- SymbolCancelToken::cancelled_at(), object_id()
- Cx::clone() (most-cloned object in the runtime)
- Cx::current() (TLS access on every poll)
- Cx::retype() (capability narrowing)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
